_meta.note: staging host is deliberate in src (use-featured-dtfs.ts TODO) — mock must intercept api-staging too

brand.about:
The Reserve AI Infrastructure DTF (BUILDOUT) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed semiconductor and hardware companies at the center of the AI buildout. 

The basket holds the 25 largest US-listed companies across this AI hardware stack, weighted by market capitalization with a 10% cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why an AI infrastructure DTF? Before any model can run, someone has to build the machine: the chips that compute, the memory that feeds them, the equipment and foundries that make them, and the power that runs it all. The BUILDOUT DTF gives you direct exposure to the picks and shovels of the AI buildout: the semiconductors, memory, manufacturing equipment, networking, and power that every AI dollar flows through first. 

BUILDOUT bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

bridge.name: Ondo Tokenized Stocks
bridge.description: An Ondo Tokenized Stock is a blockchain token that gives you the same economic exposure as owning the underlying stock or ETF. Please read the documentation for more details.
risks: Custodial risks - Tokens are claims on structures holding the underlying equities via third-party custodians, whose failure or insolvency could delay settlement or cause loss of value.
Regulatory & compliance risks - Tokenized equities face evolving rules and may require whitelisting or eligibility, which can force restricted access, halted redemptions, or unwinding.
Liquidity risks - On-chain trading is 24/7, but mint/redeem may be limited or windowed, and in stressed markets token prices can deviate from the underlying equities.
Market access & redemption risks - Mint/redeem may be capacity-limited, whitelisted, or tied to market hours, which can block arbitrage and impair exits near NAV.
Valuation & NAV risks - NAV relies on pricing from on-chain markets or oracles that can be stale or manipulated, distorting marks and mint/redeem pricing.

brand.about:
The Reserve AI Power DTF (POWER) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed power companies at the center of the AI buildout.

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI data-center power demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $10B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a power DTF? Strip away the software and the chips, and AI comes down to electricity: a single AI data center can draw as much power as a small city, and the grid was never built for hundreds of them. The POWER DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies that generate, move, and condition that electricity: the gas turbines, nuclear plants, grid and electrical equipment, and power chips behind the AI buildout.

POWER bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual share held in a regulated US brokerage account.

bridge.name: Ondo Tokenized Stocks
bridge.description: An Ondo Tokenized Stock is a blockchain token that gives you the same economic exposure as owning the underlying stock or ETF. Please read the documentation for more details.
risks: Custodial risks - Tokens are claims on structures holding the underlying equities via third-party custodians, whose failure or insolvency could delay settlement or cause loss of value.

Regulatory & compliance risks - Tokenized equities face evolving rules and may require whitelisting or eligibility, which can force restricted access, halted redemptions, or unwinding.
Liquidity risks - On-chain trading is 24/7, but mint/redeem may be limited or windowed, and in stressed markets token prices can deviate from the underlying equities.
Market access & redemption risks - Mint/redeem may be capacity-limited, whitelisted, or tied to market hours, which can block arbitrage and impair exits near NAV.
Valuation & NAV risks - NAV relies on pricing from on-chain markets or oracles that can be stale or manipulated, distorting marks and mint/redeem pricing.

brand.about:
The Reserve AI Photonics DTF (PHOTON) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed photonics companies at the center of the AI buildout.

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI data-center photonics demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $5B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a photonics DTF? Inside AI data centers, light is replacing copper wire: as AI chips get faster and more data-hungry, the bottleneck shifts from computing the data to moving it, and copper hits a physical wall of heat, power loss, and limited reach. The PHOTON DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies making that shift: the fiber, lasers, transceivers, and optical chips that have become the central nervous system of the AI data center.

PHOTON bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held by Ondo in a regulated US brokerage account.

brand.about:
The Reserve AI Capacity & Neocloud DTF (NEOCLOUD) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed neocloud and AI data-center companies at the center of the AI buildout.  

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI compute demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $5B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a neocloud DTF? Building an AI data center costs billions, so most companies that need AI computing rent it instead: a new industry of neoclouds and power-rich data-center operators raises the capital, secures the power, and rents out compute by the hour. The NEOCLOUD DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies turning capital, silicon, and electricity into the compute everyone needs: the GPU-cloud operators and the power-rich sites that host them.

NEOCLOUD bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

brand.about:
The Reserve Robotics DTF (ROBOTS) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed robotics and automation companies at the center of the AI buildout.  

The basket is composed of companies with significant and growing exposure to robotics and automation demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $2B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a robotics DTF? AI is moving off the screen and into the physical world: the same breakthroughs that taught software to reason are now teaching machines to perceive, decide, and act, and to take on physical labor. The ROBOTS DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies building that transition: the humanoids, surgical robots, factory and warehouse automation, lidar, machine vision, and the chips that let machines navigate the real world.

ROBOTS bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

Liquidity risks - On-chain trading is 24/7, but mint/redeem may be limited or windowed, and in stressed markets token prices can deviate from the underlying equities.
Market access & redemption risks - Mint/redeem may be capacity-limited, whitelisted, or tied to market hours, which can block arbitrage and impair exits near NAV.
Valuation & NAV risks - NAV relies on pricing from on-chain markets or oracles that can be stale or manipulated, distorting marks and mint/redeem pricing.

bridge.name: Ondo Tokenized Stocks
bridge.description: An Ondo Tokenized Stock is a blockchain token that gives you the same economic exposure as owning the underlying stock or ETF. Please read the documentation for more details.
risks: Custodial risks - Tokens are claims on structures holding the underlying equities via third-party custodians, whose failure or insolvency could delay settlement or cause loss of value.

Valuation & NAV risks - NAV relies on pricing from on-chain markets or oracles that can be stale or manipulated, distorting marks and mint/redeem pricing.
